calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-20-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-20-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Arnold Evje II, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Eddie Brown, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Vallieroy Jones.
Exhibit 1 - Three-Day Notice dtd. 01-09-07-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 670 Eddy St., #306, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back-Rent and Damages $1,536.40
Costs $195.00, for a Total of $1,721.40
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC,INC.
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT VALLEIROY JONES

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
